text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Hi Michael, my name is Edward Turner. I saw your advertisement at a local event and wanted to inquire about your loyalty program options.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Great to hear from you, Edward! I appreciate your interest. We do have a loyalty program that rewards regular customers.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Oh, that sounds interesting. Can you tell me how it works?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! For every $100 you spend at our shop, you earn a $10 credit towards your next service. It's a great way to save on future repairs.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That sounds really beneficial! Are there any specific services that qualify for this program?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Yes, it applies to most of our services, including oil changes, tire rotations, and more complex repairs.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Perfect! I usually get my oil changed every few months. How much do you charge for that?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Our oil change service ranges from $40 to $60, and it includes up to 5 quarts of oil and a new filter.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That’s pretty reasonable. What about the waiting time for an oil change?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Typically, it takes about 30 minutes to complete an oil change.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Great! I might want to schedule that soon. Are there any other promotions currently available?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: At the moment, we’re also offering a discount on tire rotations for loyalty members—just $20 instead of the regular $25.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That's a good deal! I could definitely use a tire rotation soon as well.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: I'm glad you think so! Would you like to schedule an appointment for either of those services?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Yes, I think I’d like to get both done. Can you do that?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Sure, how about we start with the oil change and then do the tire rotation right after?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Sounds good! What dates do you have available?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: We have openings tomorrow morning or Thursday afternoon. Which works better for you?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Tomorrow morning works for me. What time?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: We can fit you in at 9 AM if that works.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Yes, that’s perfect!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Alright, I’ll put you down for tomorrow at 9 AM for an oil change and tire rotation.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thank you! Do I need to bring anything?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Just your vehicle and any loyalty program details if you have them.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Got it. I appreciate your help, Michael!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: You're welcome, Edward! We look forward to seeing you tomorrow.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thanks! Have a great day!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: You too! Bye now.
segments.speaker: local party
